message:
Streamline LinkCard styling with Tenzir design tokens

Apply consistent Tenzir brand styling across custom and Starlight LinkCard
components. Use neutral-200 borders, shadow-xs, and primary-500 arrows per
design system. Add customIcon prop for SVG icons and use OCSF logo on the
OCSF reference page. Add @assets path alias for cleaner imports. Reciprocal
sync comments keep custom LinkCard and Starlight overrides in alignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,9 @@ title: OCSF
 description: Reference documentation for the Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework (OCSF).
 ---
 
-import { Aside, CardGrid, LinkCard } from "@astrojs/starlight/components";
+import { Aside, CardGrid } from "@astrojs/starlight/components";
+import LinkCard from "@components/LinkCard.astro";
+import ocsfIcon from "@assets/ocsf.svg?raw";
 
 <Aside type="tip" title="AI-Optimized Documentation">
 This reference is optimized for AI agents.
@@ -20,21 +22,25 @@ for normalizing security telemetry across tools and vendors.
     title="Schema"
     description="Browse event classes, objects, and profiles"
     href="/reference/ocsf/1-7-0"
+    customIcon={ocsfIcon}
   />
   <LinkCard
     title="FAQs"
     description="Common questions about OCSF"
     href="/reference/ocsf/faqs"
+    customIcon={ocsfIcon}
   />
   <LinkCard
     title="Articles"
     description="In-depth guides and best practices"
     href="/reference/ocsf/articles"
+    customIcon={ocsfIcon}
   />
   <LinkCard
     title="Official OCSF Site"
     description="Learn more at ocsf.io"
     href="https://ocsf.io"
+    customIcon={ocsfIcon}
   />
 </CardGrid>
